creator: mefistofelez@hotmail.com
text:
Machine hangs with an output in verbose mode:

/boot/kernel/acpi.ko text=0x44a7c data=0x24c0+0x1b8c syms=[0x4+0x7d50+0x4+0xaae0
]
SMAP type=01 base=00000000 00000000 len=00000000 0009bc00
SMAP type=02 base=00000000 0009bc00 len=00000000 00000400
SMAP type=02 base=00000000 000e0000 len=00000000 00020000
SMAP type=01 base=00000000 00100000 len=00000000 3fec0000
SMAP type=03 base=00000000 3ffe0000 len=00000000 00018000


Additional notes:
Sometimes there are more SMAP messages.
The machine has been running Debian Etch without any problems; this is my first attempt on FreeBSD.

How-To-Repeat: Reboot or restart the machine by recycling power..
